name: window-title
author: lumine-code
description: Customize the window title with a template

template.title: Window Title Template
template.description: Template for the window title. Placeholders: `{projectTitle}`, `{projectName}`, `{projectPath}`, `{fileName}`, `{filePath}`, `{relativeFilePath}`, `{gitHead}`, `{appName}`, `{devMode}`, `{safeMode}`. Empty placeholders are removed. If the template renders empty, the default title is kept.
